title: White Fabric Hemming Web Tape Roll, 25 meter - Easy-to-Use, Ideal Permanent Solution for Bonding Fabrics Together
features: SEW-FREE CONVENIENCE: Say goodbye to the hassle of needle and thread. Our white hemming web tape roll offers a powerful, sew-free solution for all your fabric bonding needs. Simply apply with an iron for a secure and lasting hold.

PREMIUM MATERIAL: Crafted from high-quality, man-made fabric, our hemming tape is designed for both durability and ease of use. It's the perfect choice for both novice crafters and seasoned professionals.

IDEAL PERMANENT SOLUTION: Our hemming web is not just a quick fix but a permanent bonding solution. Its strong adhesion properties ensure fabrics stay bonded through wear and wash, making it ideal for long-lasting repairs and creations.
VERSATILE APPLICATION: Whether you're working with curtains, upholstery, or clothing, our hemming web is compatible with most fabrics. It's your go-to resource for no-sew hemming and fabric repairs.

LARGE SCALE APPLICATIONS: With a roll measuring 25 meters in length, you'll have plenty of hemming web to tackle multiple projects or large-scale applications. Whether it's shortening curtains, crafting, or garment adjustments, our web tape has got you covered.
description: Product Description DESCRIPTION: Premium quality hemming web is 25 metres in length and can be used on most fabrics by simply ironing. Safety Warning No warning applicable
